name: Walnut Interactive Sales Demo API
what_it_does: No-code interactive sales demo platform with REST API — enabling sales teams to create personalized, clickable product demos from screenshots or screen capture, customize demos per prospect without engineering help, track demo engagement analytics, and automate demo delivery for consistent sales storytelling.
use_cases: Querying demo view and engagement analytics for sales rep coaching and pipeline analysis
Creating personalized demo variants for specific accounts via API integration with CRM
Integrating Walnut demo engagement data with Salesforce for pipeline health indicators
Managing demo templates and sharing with sales teams programmatically
Automating demo creation from templates when new opportunities are created in CRM
not_for: Live product sandbox environments (use Demostack or Reprise for live environments)
Video-based async sales demos (use Loom for video)
Marketing-facing demos on website (use Arcade or Supademo for lighter weight)
best_when: An enterprise sales team needs to create highly personalized, clickable product demos for each prospect quickly without engineering, with analytics to understand what resonates in the sales process.
avoid_when: You need live sandbox demo environments with actual product functionality, or you primarily want demos for marketing website rather than sales outreach.

auth.notes: API key from Walnut account settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. Webhook for demo view and completion events. No OAuth2. Salesforce and HubSpot native integrations via separate OAuth flow.

pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 2020. Raised $56M. Backed by Greenfield Partners, Felicis, 8VC. Enterprise-focused pricing. Personalization at scale — one template, many variants. Salesforce and HubSpot native apps. Analytics show demo drop-off and hot spots. Strong in enterprise SaaS sales motion.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for demos, templates, analytics, and viewers. Bearer token auth. Good developer documentation. Demo creation primarily via Walnut editor — API provides template management and analytics. Webhook for engagement events. CRM integrations use separate OAuth flows.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Demo reads fully idempotent. Template reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Viewer session reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Demo creation requires Walnut editor — API provides management and analytics only
Enterprise pricing ($6K+/year) — verify budget before integration investment
CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot) uses separate OAuth — not API key
Demo personalization via templates — understand template vs demo distinction
Annual contract typical — evaluate commitment before API integration build

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Product demos may contain proprietary UI — review content security. Viewer tracking analytics require GDPR consent for EU prospects. Israeli company with strong US enterprise security posture.
